pubmed.query: ("rheumatoid arthritis"[Title] OR "systemic lupus erythematosus"[Title] OR "lupus nephritis"[Title] OR "Sjögren syndrome"[Title] OR "Sjogren syndrome"[Title] OR "Sjögren disease"[Title] OR "systemic sclerosis"[Title] OR "systemic scleroderma"[Title] OR "idiopathic inflammatory myopathy"[Title] OR dermatomyositis[Title] OR polymyositis[Title] OR "immune-mediated necrotizing myopathy"[Title] OR "antisynthetase syndrome"[Title] OR spondyloarthritis[Title] OR "axial spondyloarthritis"[Title] OR "ankylosing spondylitis"[Title] OR "psoriatic arthritis"[Title] OR "ANCA-associated vasculitis"[Title] OR "giant cell arteritis"[Title] OR "Takayasu arteritis"[Title] OR "Behcet disease"[Title] OR "Behçet disease"[Title] OR "granulomatosis with polyangiitis"[Title] OR "microscopic polyangiitis"[Title] OR "eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis"[Title] OR "antiphospholipid syndrome"[Title] OR "IgG4-related disease"[Title] OR "adult-onset Still disease"[Title] OR "familial Mediterranean fever"[Title] OR "cryopyrin-associated periodic syndrome"[Title] OR gout[Title] OR "calcium pyrophosphate deposition"[Title] OR "juvenile idiopathic arthritis"[Title] OR "juvenile systemic lupus"[Title] OR "juvenile dermatomyositis"[Title]) NOT "lupus vulgaris"[Title]
